mapper.select: SELECT user_id, play_count,win_count,win_robot FROM `info_user_playing` WHERE `win_robot` > #{winRobot} AND `play_count` > #{playCount}

SELECT room_id, userid_0, win_point_0,control_level_0, userid_1, win_point_1,control_level_1 ,userid_2, win_point_2,control_level_2 ,userid_3, win_point_3,control_level_3 ,userid_4, win_point_4,control_level_4 ,userid_5, win_point_5,control_level_5 FROM `rec_settlement` WHERE (`userid_0` = #{uid} and 0 > control_level_0 and win_point_0 >0) OR (`userid_1` = #{uid} and 0 > control_level_1 and win_point_1 >0) OR (`userid_2` = #{uid} and 0 >control_level_2 and win_point_2 >0) OR (`userid_3` = #{uid} and 0 >control_level_3 and win_point_3 >0) OR (`userid_4` = #{uid} and 0 >control_level_4 and win_point_4 >0) OR (`userid_5` = #{uid} and 0 >control_level_5 and win_point_5 >0)

SELECT room_id, userid_0, win_point_0,control_level_0, userid_1, win_point_1,control_level_1 ,userid_2, win_point_2,control_level_2 ,userid_3, win_point_3,control_level_3 ,userid_4, win_point_4,control_level_4 ,userid_5, win_point_5,control_level_5 FROM`rec_settlement` WHERE `end_time` between #{endTimeStart} and #{endTimeEnd}

SELECT id,room_id, userid_0, win_point_0,control_level_0, userid_1, win_point_1,control_level_1 ,userid_2, win_point_2,control_level_2 ,userid_3, win_point_3,control_level_3 ,userid_4, win_point_4,control_level_4 ,userid_5, win_point_5,control_level_5 FROM`rec_settlement` WHERE `end_time` between #{endTimeStart} and #{endTimeEnd} ORDER BY `end_time` limit #{begin},#{length}
